message:
chore: deprecate CreateOptions.Type in favor of Labels

Add Labels []string field to CreateOptions; Labels takes precedence over
the deprecated Type field which is preserved for backward compatibility.
All 7 production callers migrated to Labels (gt:task, gt:merge-request);
test callers intentionally left on Type for regression coverage of the
fallback path.

Closes #2317

Co-Authored-By: Chris Deal <cdeal@mines.edu>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -55,10 +55,9 @@ func (b *Beads) GetOrCreateHandoffBead(role string) (*Issue, error) {
 		return existing, nil
 	}
 
-	// Create new handoff bead (type is deprecated, uses gt:task label via backward compat)
 	issue, err := b.Create(CreateOptions{
 		Title:       HandoffBeadTitle(role),
-		Type:        "task", // Converted to gt:task label by Create()
+		Labels:      []string{"gt:task"},
 		Priority:    2,
 		Description: "", // Empty until first handoff
 		Actor:       role,

@@ -805,7 +805,7 @@ func runDone(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) (retErr error) {
 
 			mrIssue, err := bd.Create(beads.CreateOptions{
 				Title:       title,
-				Type:        "merge-request",
+				Labels:      []string{"gt:merge-request"},
 				Priority:    priority,
 				Description: description,
 				Ephemeral:   true,

@@ -282,7 +282,7 @@ squashed_at: %s
 		digestIssue, err := b.Create(beads.CreateOptions{
 			Title:       digestTitle,
 			Description: digestDesc,
-			Type:        "task",
+			Labels:      []string{"gt:task"},
 			Priority:    4,       // P4 - backlog priority for digests
 			Actor:       target,
 			Ephemeral:   true,    // Don't export to JSONL - daily aggregation handles permanent record

@@ -1146,7 +1146,7 @@ The Refinery will automatically retry the merge after you force-push.`,
 	taskTitle := fmt.Sprintf("Resolve merge conflicts: %s", originalTitle)
 	task, err := e.beads.Create(beads.CreateOptions{
 		Title:       taskTitle,
-		Type:        "task",
+		Labels:      []string{"gt:task"},
 		Priority:    mr.Priority,
 		Description: description,
 		Actor:       e.rig.Name + "/refinery",
